allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\i99" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not \(Test-Path "c:\\i99"\)\) { Write-Host "Directory does not exist, creating..." })

PowerShell($timeout = 90; $elapsed = 0; while \($elapsed -lt $timeout\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $elapsed += 5; $result = docker info 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Host "Docker pronto! \($elapsed s\)"; break } else { Write-Host "Aguardando Docker... \($elapsed s\)" } }; if \($elapsed -ge $timeout\) { Write-Host "Timeout - Docker nao iniciou" })
PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\i99\\deliveryhub"; $env:DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/deliveryhub?schema=public"; npx prisma migrate dev --name init 2>&1)

PowerShell($search = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/search?q=hamburguer" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "Search: $\($search.StatusCode\) \($\($search.Content.Length\) bytes\)"; $fav = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/favoritos" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Favoritos \(no auth\): $\($fav.StatusCode\)")
